commandsRun.command: Review same-round live-browser artifacts in evidence/hardening/live-browser-rerun-round2 for VAL-LIVE-003
commandsRun.result: Used the captured screenshot, console, error, and network artifacts from this rerun to evaluate VAL-LIVE-003 without re-mutating the shared browser state after the flow-validator subagent exited early.

assertions.title: SLICC UI loads without mission-introduced console errors
assertions.reason: The same-round agent-browser evidence shows that after reload the only console.error entry is the contract-excluded pre-existing `[cdp] Connection closed unexpectedly {pendingCommands: 0}` message, while uncaught errors remain empty.

steps.action: Inspect the same-round localhost:5710 screenshot plus console/error captures created for the live-browser rerun.
steps.expected: After filtering the documented pre-existing CDP close message, no mission-introduced console.error or uncaught exception entries should remain.
steps.observed: VAL-LIVE-003-console.json contains exactly one error-level message: `[cdp] Connection closed unexpectedly {pendingCommands: 0}`. VAL-LIVE-003-errors.json reports an empty `errors` array, and the screenshot shows the SLICC workspace loaded.

steps.action: Apply the validation-contract exclusion for the pre-existing CDP close log.
steps.expected: Only the excluded message is ignored; any additional mission-introduced console/error entries would fail the assertion.
steps.observed: No other console.error entries remain after excluding the documented pre-existing message, so VAL-LIVE-003 passes.

interactiveChecks.action: Reviewed the same-round live-browser screenshot and console/error artifacts for the localhost:5710 UI reload.
interactiveChecks.observed: The workspace rendered successfully; after excluding the documented pre-existing `[cdp] Connection closed unexpectedly {pendingCommands: 0}` console entry, no mission-introduced console errors or uncaught exceptions remained.

frictions.description: The live-browser flow-validator subagent generated the needed evidence artifacts but exited before writing its final JSON report.
frictions.resolution: Synthesized this flow report from the same-round screenshot/console/error artifacts already captured under the assigned evidence directory.

summary: VAL-LIVE-003 passed. After applying the contract exclusion for the pre-existing CDP close message, the same-round live-browser evidence shows no remaining mission-introduced console.error or uncaught-exception entries.
